title: Sunlit remedy
description:
Sunlit remedy is a visual novel in which you play as a shut-in who has stayed indoors for five years. You will meet a girl who belongs only to you, and through your long days together, you will find courage, companionship, and love—slowly stepping out of your room to embrace the bright sunlight outside.

Come and date the girl who is most dear to you!

Character IntroductionName: Shizuki Akari

Age: 16

Height: 160 cm

Weight: 50 kg

Measurements: 85/64/88

 

A mysterious girl of unknown origin with a lively yet gentle personality. She first appears in the waiting room of a hospital. Her favorite food is warm canned red bean soup, and she possesses an extraordinary curiosity about many things.

This work was created with the assistance of AI illustration.
